arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM OpenID Connect provider.

client_id_list.description: A list of client IDs (also known as audiences) that are allowed to access the IAM OpenID Connect provider.

id.description: The ID of the IAM OpenID Connect provider.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the IAM OpenID Connect provider.

thumbprint_list.description: A list of certificate thumbprints for the IAM OpenID Connect provider's server certificate(s).

url.description: The URL of the IAM OpenID Connect provider.
